steps.t: Brombard Foxtail is at the Mathom-house in Michel Delving, far west of Tuckborough. Adelard Took asked you to travel to the Mathom-house in Michel Del…
The Methel-stage is on the southern side of the road heading west out of Bywater. Adelard Took had asked you to fire the rocket off at the Methel-stag…
Adelard Took can be found at the Great Smials in Tuckborough. You should return to Adelard Took and let him know that you have done as he asked.
